g.text: Traffic Mgr · App Gateway (WAF) · VNet · NAT GW · Firewall
Network Watcher · Storage Account · Key Vault · Entra ID
PostgreSQL · Redis · Azure Monitor · Defender for Cloud
→ almost every service you have needs posture checks
Container Registry (images in use by K8s)
→ your biggest gap — recently migrated, unknown posture
AKS pods/nodes · Kafka VMs · Jump VMs (Windows)
→ anything running code needs runtime protection
Key Vault access policies · AKS workload identity
→ Entra ID + Key Vault combo is high-risk if misconfigured
Container Registry — every image pushed needs scanning
→ ACR has built-in Defender integration but needs config
Your infra-as-code for all above services (Terraform/Bicep/ARM)
Helm charts for K8s workloads · .env files · GitHub repos
→ shift-left: catch issues before deploy, not after
Check: MFA enforced? External sharing blocked? DKIM/DMARC?
→ lower priority but O365 is common breach entry point
